reviews.review_description: You feel like your inside a ultra reflective shuttle trapped in space with nothing to do but push buttons and endlessly float in space waiting for your head to explode from boredom!

I was blown away by this shuttle, I'm a voyager fan and this really does feel like a authentic shuttle,  with interaction too !  would be amazing if you could do the uss voyager ship to explore or even the delta flyer.   or perhaps make it so the transporter could transport you to a planet or something.  love the captain's log and the ability to drive the shuttle, would be good to have a warp option  too, would be willing to pay for updates etc.
Full marks on this demo, does give the feeling of being in one of  Voyager's shuttles. Keep on the good work :)
more star trek environments. I liked the reflections in this one, and the video playback and the soundscapes and all of it. Loved it.

OK, being able to get into a shuttle and actually get it to move is kinda epic. What it lacks is playability. Severe limitations on what you can do, and more controls that you can't touch and ha e no affect then you know what to do with.
If you set course and speed and move around the ship, the other displays simply do not do anything. Another severe loss is no warp capabilities. I hope this is getting ported into an actual game, but there is a lot that could be added to make it seem a little more true. Like a replicator... Lol
Nice but semi blurry visuals. As a long time star trek fan I did nerd out, it just went by kinda quick.

Tried this demo which could have possibilities, you can move the ship and operate a very few systems....but... 90% of the panels are unreadable. as a keen trekkie of some 50 plus years I sincerely hope the developers perfect this simulation as I would happily pay for a fully operational one ...in might be an idea if it could be integrated into "STAR TREK : Bridge crew" on ubisoft, would be great for away missions etc.

Thank you for making this! I have WAYS DREAMED of being inside of a starship or even this shuttle is really awesome! You did a great work i would pay money for a Starship like Voyager or Discovery or Enterprise I know thats asking alot but you have GOLD here! I LOVE THIS DEMO!! THANK YOU AGAIN THIS!!!
Most of it is flat pictures with buttons behind it.
Great work! It's so nice to be able to pilot a shuttle the way it was meant to be piloted! The hand tracking is amazing and I look forward to seeing where you take this project in the future! LLAP!

What a great little experience 

Found myself just relaxing watching the cosmos go by 

Genuine feeling of movement with some excellent reflections & interactions I can't wait to see were this ends up 

Would tweak the movement & the displays higher res..less pixelated at least 

Other than that really felt I was out of my crappy life for a while ..& maaaaaan those reflections ..who said that couldn't be done without being tethered to a high end PC 

Bravo Devs 

Cheers 😁

This is good! A few picky things to fix:
Some of the seams are off letting the space be seen outside of the shuttle. 
The panels are a bit too reflective and the resolution could be higher.
I would love more diversity in the space outside...maybe a planet or nebula cloud to cruise in.
Would love to be able to invite someone to join and talk Trek.
That’s what I always wanted.  Thank you :-)
